data.title: Bitcoin falls to 6-month low as ETF demand collapses: Finance Redefined
data.description:
Bitcoin drops to a six-month low as spot ETF outflows resume despite the US shutdown ending, signaling weak demand and renewed pressure on crypto markets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-falls-6-month-low-etf-demand-collapses-finance-redefined?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Ftimestamp%3D1763147079386%26ttl%3D0%26_q%3D1763147079386%26ttt%3D1763147079386&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Forget The Obituaries—Cardano Is Alive, Says Bitcoin Analyst
data.description:
Widely followed Bitcoin figure Lark Davis pushed back on suggestions that Cardano is finished, saying, “what is dead can never die. ” At the same time, he pointed out that on-chain activity looks flat. Related Reading: Dogecoin Alert! Price Could Explode Over 2,800%, Analyst Says Cardano (ADA) was trading at $0. 51, down 8
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/forget-the-obituaries-cardano-is-alive-says-bitcoin-analyst/

data.title:
When $BTC topped in 2017, we saw a massive decline in $BTC.D. 

This is not a call for a similar move. More so comparing how that cycle played out and how different it currently is.

In 2017/18, BTC topped out and people that missed the rally went on to max bid any alt out there

data.title: 'Demonic': AI App That Lets Users 'Talk' to Dead Loved Ones Faces Backlash
data.description:
2Wai’s new “HoloAvatar” tool turns minutes of footage into lifelike replicas of deceased loved ones, igniting ethical alarms over consent, privacy, and the commercialization of grief.
source: https://decrypt.co/348707/demonic-ai-app-lets-users-talk-dead-loved-ones-faces-backlash

data.title: Bitcoin crashes below $100K as $448m in leveraged longs get liquidated
data.description:
Bitcoin broke through the critical $100,000 support level on Thursday, plunging to $97,031 and unleashing a liquidation cascade that wiped out $448. 48 million in leveraged long positions.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitcoin-crashes-below-100k-as-448m-in-leveraged-longs-get-liquidated/
